Class DefenseReductionEffect

java.lang.Object
logic.effect.LingeringEffect
logic.effect.DefenseReductionEffect
All Implemented Interfaces:
CombatEffect
public class DefenseReductionEffect extends LingeringEffect
Represents a lingering combat effect that temporarily reduces a target unit's defense by a specified percentage. The exact amount of defense points reduced is calculated at the moment of application and is cleanly restored when the effect expires.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface logic.effect.CombatEffect

    gm

    Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a default defense reduction of 50%.

    Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a custom defense reduction percentage.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefenseReductionEffect

      public DefenseReductionEffect(int duration)
      Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a default defense reduction of 50%.
      Parameters:
      duration - The number of turns or ticks this debuff will remain active.

    • DefenseReductionEffect

      public DefenseReductionEffect(int duration, double reductionPercentage)
      Constructs a new DefenseReductionEffect with a custom defense reduction percentage.
      Parameters:
      duration - The number of turns or ticks this debuff will remain active.
      reductionPercentage - The fractional percentage of defense to reduce (e.g., 0.25 for 25%).

  • Method Details

    • onInitialApply

      protected void onInitialApply(BaseUnit target)
      Applies the initial defense reduction to the target unit. If the target is already afflicted by a DefenseReductionEffect, this method simply refreshes the duration of the existing effect to prevent stacking the debuff multiple times. Otherwise, it calculates the reduction amount, applies it, and registers the effect.
      Specified by:
      onInitialApply in class LingeringEffect
      Parameters:
      target - The unit receiving the defense reduction debuff.

    • tick

      public void tick(BaseUnit target)
      Executes the recurring logic for this effect. This method is intentionally empty because the stat reduction is handled entirely upfront during application and persists statically until removal.
      Specified by:
      tick in class LingeringEffect
      Parameters:
      target - The unit currently holding this debuff.

    • remove

      public void remove(BaseUnit target)
      Executes the cleanup logic when the debuff expires or is cleansed. Restores the exact amount of defense points that were deducted during the initial application.
      Specified by:
      remove in class LingeringEffect
      Parameters:
      target - The unit from which the debuff is being removed.
